narrative: US-Iran tensions and Fed tightening bets pressure gold toward $4,500 as USD/JPY holds 159.20; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid while moderate put skew in 25d RR (-1.41) signals hedging against a sharp reversal. NZD/USD firms to 0.5870 ahead of the RBNZ decision as markets price future hikes despite a -0.83% real rate. Gold higher +0.12%; equities +0.61%; DXY -0.08%; VIX 17.0. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision at 02:00 UTC and Australia CPI at 01:30 UTC.
